title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
plot: After the battle between the Autobots and Decepticons that leveled Chicago, humanity thinks that all alien robots are a threat. So Harold Attinger, a CIA agent, establishes a unit whose sole purpose is to hunt down all of them. But it turns out that they are aided by another alien robot who is searching for Optimus Prime. Cade Yeager, a "robotics expert", buys an old truck and upon examining it, he thinks it's a Transformer. When he powers it up, he discovers it's Optimus Prime. Later, men from the unit show up looking for Optimus. He helps Yeager and his daughter Tessa escape but are pursued by the hunter. They escape and Yeager learns from technology he took from the men that a technology magnate and defense contractor named Joshua Joyce is part of what's going on, so they go to find out what's going on.
expanded_plot: Four years after the devastating battle between the Autobots and Decepticons that left Chicago in ruins, a pervasive fear of all alien robots has gripped humanity. This widespread sentiment leads to the establishment of a specialized unit within the CIA, led by the stern agent Harold Attinger, with the explicit and sole mission to hunt down and eliminate all extraterrestrial robotic life forms. Unbeknownst to many, this human task force receives clandestine assistance from another alien robot, a formidable hunter who is relentlessly pursuing Optimus Prime for unknown reasons. Meanwhile, in Texas, Cade Yeager, a self-proclaimed robotics expert struggling to make ends meet, stumbles upon an old, dilapidated semi-truck. Intrigued by its unique design and potential salvage value, he purchases it. Upon closer inspection, Yeager suspects the truck is more than it appears, believing it to be a Transformer. His suspicions are confirmed when he attempts to power it up, revealing the iconic leader of the Autobots, Optimus Prime, in his disguised form. This discovery, however, quickly draws unwanted attention. Soon after Optimus's activation, agents from Attinger's unit, aided by the alien hunter, descend upon Yeager's property, looking for Optimus. Optimus Prime, despite his weakened state, bravely intervenes, helping Cade and his bewildered daughter, Tessa, escape the immediate threat. The trio is forced to flee, relentlessly pursued by the alien hunter and Attinger's operatives. During their narrow escape, Cade manages to salvage advanced technology from the pursuing agents. Analyzing this tech, he uncovers a shocking revelation: a powerful technology magnate and defense contractor named Joshua Joyce is intricately involved in the clandestine operations against the Transformers. Realizing the depth of the conspiracy and the danger they are in, Cade, Tessa, and Optimus set out to confront Joyce and uncover the full scope of what is truly happening.

omdb_payload.Title: Transformers: Age of Extinction
omdb_payload.Actors: Mark Wahlberg, Nicola Peltz Beckham, Jack Reynor
